title: The semilinear Euler-Poisson-Darboux equation: a case of wave with   critical dissipation
summary:
In this paper we study the existence of global-in-time energy solutions to
the Cauchy problem for the Euler-Poisson-Darboux equation, with a power
nonlinearity: $$u_{tt}-u_{xx} + \frac\mu{t}\,u_t = |u|^p \,, \quad t>t_0, \
x\in\mathbb{R}\,.$$ Here either $t_0=0$ (singular problem) or $t_0>0$ (regular
problem). This model represents a wave equation with critical dissipation, in
the sense that the possibility to have global small data solutions depend not
only on the power $p$, but also on the parameter $\mu$. We prove that, assuming
small initial data in $L^1$ and in the energy space, global-in-time energy
solutions exist for $p>p_c =\max\{p_0(1+\mu),3\}$, for any $\mu>0$, where
$p_0(k)$ is the critical exponent for the semilinear wave equation without
dissipation in space dimension $k$, conjectured by W.A. Strauss, and $3$ is the
critical exponent obtained by H. Fujita for semilinear heat equations. We also
collect some global-in-time existence result of small data solutions for the
multidimensional EPD equation $$u_{tt}-\Delta u + \frac\mu{t}\,u_t = |u|^p \,,
\quad t>t_0, \ x\in\mathbb{R}^n\,,$$ with powers $p$ greater than Fujita
exponent and sufficiently large $\mu$.

AI.tldr: 证明了带临界耗散的Euler-Poisson-Darboux方程在小初值条件下全局能量解的存在性，确定了临界指数p_c
AI.motivation: 研究带幂次非线性项的Euler-Poisson-Darboux方程的全局解存在性问题，该方程具有临界耗散项μ/t·u_t，其全局解的存在性不仅依赖于非线性指数p，还依赖于参数μ
AI.techniques: 使用小初值方法，结合L^1和能量空间假设，通过比较Strauss临界指数p_0(k)和Fujita临界指数，建立全局存在性条件
AI.main_theorems: 证明了当p>p_c=max{p_0(1+μ),3}时，一维EPD方程存在全局能量解；对多维情况，当p大于Fujita指数且μ足够大时，也存在全局小数据解
AI.significance: 建立了带临界耗散波动方程的全局解理论，统一了波动方程和热方程的临界指数理论，为这类混合型方程的研究提供了重要基准

title: Existence and asymptotic behavior for $L^2$-norm preserving nonlinear   heat equations
summary:
We consider a nonlinear parabolic equation with a nonlocal term, which
preserves the $L^2$-norm of the solution. We study the local and global well
posedness on a bounded domain, as well as the whole Euclidean space, in $H^1$.
Then we study the asymptotic behavior of solutions. In general, we obtain weak
convergence in H^1 to a stationary state. For a ball, we prove strong
asymptotic convergence to the ground state when the initial condition is
positive.

AI.tldr: 研究具有L²范数守恒的非局部非线性抛物方程在H¹空间中的适定性与渐近行为
AI.motivation: 研究一类具有非局部项的非线性抛物方程，该方程保持解的L²范数守恒，这类方程在物理和数学中具有重要应用，如描述某些守恒系统的演化过程
AI.techniques: 使用抛物方程理论、能量方法、紧性论证、渐近分析、变分方法，特别针对球域上的正初值问题采用特殊技术
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在有界域和全空间上建立H¹空间中的局部和全局适定性；2. 证明解在H¹中弱收敛到稳态解；3. 对于球域上的正初值，证明强渐近收敛到基态解
AI.significance: 为具有非局部项和守恒性质的抛物方程提供了系统的适定性理论，建立了渐近收敛结果，特别在球域上获得了更强的收敛性，对理解这类系统的长期行为有重要意义

title: Stability of Cnoidal Waves for the Damped Nonlinear Schr\"odinger   Equation
comment:
34 pages, comments are welcome. v2: minor modifications to fix the
  final part of the main proof
summary:
We consider the cubic nonlinear Schr\"odinger (NLS) equation with a linear
damping on the one dimensional torus and we investigate the stability of some
solitary wave profiles within the dissipative dynamics. The undamped cubic NLS
equation is well known to admit a family of periodic waves given by Jacobi
elliptic functions of cnoidal type. We show that the family of cnoidal waves is
orbitally stable. More precisely, by considering a sufficiently small
perturbation of a given cnoidal wave at initial time, the evolution will always
remain close (up to symmetries of the equation) to the cnoidal wave whose mass
is modulated according to the dissipative dynamics. This result extends the
concept of orbital stability to this non-Hamiltonian evolution. Since cnoidal
waves are not exact solutions to the damped NLS, the perturbation is forced
away from the family of solitary wave profiles. In order to control this
secular growth of the error, we find a first order approximation of the
solitary wave that takes into account the dissipative term. Then we use a
suitable, exponentially decreasing Lyapunov functional that controls the
$H^1$-norm of the perturbation around the approximated solitons.

AI.tldr: 证明了带线性阻尼的一维环面上立方非线性薛定谔方程中cnoidal波的轨道稳定性
AI.motivation: 研究非哈密顿系统（带阻尼的NLS）中孤立波的稳定性问题，将轨道稳定性概念扩展到耗散动力学中
AI.techniques: 使用雅可比椭圆函数构造cnoidal波，建立一阶近似解考虑阻尼效应，构造指数衰减的Lyapunov泛函控制扰动
AI.main_theorems: 证明了带线性阻尼的立方NLS方程中cnoidal波族的轨道稳定性，即使cnoidal波不是阻尼方程的确切解
AI.significance: 将轨道稳定性理论扩展到非哈密顿系统，为耗散系统中孤立波行为的研究提供了新框架

title: A single player and a mass of agents: a pursuit evasion-like game
summary:
We study a finite-horizon differential game of pursuit-evasion like, between
a single player and a mass of agents. The player and the mass directly control
their own evolution, which for the mass is given by a first order PDE of
transport equation type. Using also an adapted concept of non-anticipating
strategies, we derive an infinite dimensional Isaacs equation, and by dynamic
programming techniques we prove that the value function is the unique viscosity
solution on a suitable invariant subset of a Hilbert space.

AI.tldr: 建立了无限维Isaacs方程，证明了值函数在希尔伯特空间合适不变子集上是唯一粘性解
AI.motivation: 研究单个玩家与大量智能体之间的有限时域追逃微分博弈，玩家和群体直接控制各自的演化，群体演化由一阶输运型PDE描述
AI.techniques: 使用非预期策略概念、动态规划技术、无限维Isaacs方程推导、粘性解理论在希尔伯特空间的应用
AI.main_theorems: 推导了无限维Isaacs方程，证明了值函数在希尔伯特空间合适不变子集上是唯一粘性解
AI.significance: 将有限维微分博弈理论推广到无限维PDE系统，为群体控制与追逃问题提供了新的数学框架和分析工具

title: The Non-cutoff Boltzmann Equation in Bounded Domains
comment:
v6: Revise the Maxwell boundary case, correct the velocity averaging
  lemma in v5, and utilize a new level-function trace estimate. Outline
  rearranged. 149 pages, 2 figures, all comments are welcome
summary:
The initial-boundary value problem for the inhomogeneous non-cutoff Boltzmann
equation is a challenging open problem. In this paper, we study the stability
and long-time dynamics of the Boltzmann equation near a global Maxwellian
without angular cutoff assumption in a general $C^3$ bounded domain $\Omega$
(including convex and non-convex cases) with physical boundary conditions:
inflow boundary and Maxwell-reflection boundary with accommodation coefficient
$\al\in(0,1)$. We obtain the global-in-time existence, which has an exponential
decay rate towards the global Maxwellian for both hard and soft potentials. The
crucial methods are the forward-backward extension of the boundary problem to
the whole space by Vlasov-type equations, a level-function trace lemma, an
improved velocity averaging lemma with less regularity but without cutoff in
velocity, and an extra damping provided by the advection operator, followed by
the De Giorgi iteration and the $L^2$--$L^\infty$ energy method.

AI.tldr: 在非凸有界区域上，对非截断Boltzmann方程证明了近全局Maxwellian解的全局存在性、指数衰减稳定性及长时间动力学
AI.motivation: 非截断Boltzmann方程在一般有界区域上的初边值问题是一个具有挑战性的开放问题，特别是对于非凸区域和物理边界条件（流入边界和Maxwell反射边界）的情况
AI.techniques: 通过Vlasov型方程将边界问题前向后向延拓到全空间，水平函数迹引理，改进的无截断速度平均引理，对流算子的额外阻尼效应，De Giorgi迭代和L²-L∞能量方法
AI.main_theorems: 在C³有界区域（包括凸和非凸情况）上，对硬势和软势都证明了近全局Maxwellian解的全局存在性，并具有指数衰减率
AI.significance: 首次在一般有界区域上解决了非截断Boltzmann方程的稳定性问题，为稀薄气体动力学提供了严格数学基础，突破了凸区域限制，发展了处理非截断碰撞算子的新方法

title: Sharp Lp-Lq estimates for evolution equations with damped oscillations
summary:
In this paper we derive sharp $L^p-L^q$ estimates, $1\leq p\leq q\leq \infty$
(including endpoint estimates as $L^1-L^1$ and $L^1-L^\infty$) for dissipative
wave-type equations, under the assumption that the dissipation dampen the
oscillations but it does not cancel them. We assume that the phase function $w$
is homogeneous of some degree $\sigma>0$ and that its Hessian matrix has
maximal rank, including the critical case $\sigma=1$, while the dissipative
term $a(\xi)>0$ may be inhomogeneous. The critical case includes waves with
viscoelastic or structural damping, damped double dispersion equations and
plate equations with rotational inertia, and so on. We also obtain the
analogous results for fractional Schr\"odinger-type equations with a potential.

AI.tldr: 建立了耗散波型方程和分数阶薛定谔型方程的尖锐L^p-L^q估计
AI.motivation: 研究耗散波型方程（如粘弹性阻尼波、结构阻尼波、阻尼双色散方程等）和分数阶薛定谔型方程的L^p-L^q估计问题，特别关注耗散项不消除振荡但能阻尼振荡的情况
AI.techniques: 利用相位函数的齐次性和Hessian矩阵的满秩条件，处理临界情况σ=1，采用调和分析和频域估计技术
AI.main_theorems: 建立了耗散波型方程和分数阶薛定谔型方程的尖锐L^p-L^q估计，包括端点估计L^1-L^1和L^1-L^∞，覆盖了临界情况σ=1
AI.significance: 为粘弹性阻尼波、结构阻尼波、阻尼双色散方程等物理模型提供了统一的估计框架，扩展了耗散波方程和分数阶薛定谔方程的理论分析工具

title: Time global existence of generalized BV flow via the Allen--Cahn   equation
comment:
15 pages. This paper draws heavily from arXiv:2305.12374. I have
  fixed minor mistakes. To appear in Interfaces Free Bound
summary:
We show that a mean curvature flow obtained as the limit of the Allen--Cahn
equation is not only a Brakke flow but also a generalized BV flow proposed by
Stuvard and Tonegawa.

AI.tldr: 证明了Allen-Cahn方程极限得到的平均曲率流不仅是Brakke流，也是Stuvard-Tonegawa提出的广义BV流
AI.motivation: 研究平均曲率流与Allen-Cahn方程之间的关系，探讨不同弱解概念之间的等价性，特别是Brakke流与广义BV流之间的联系
AI.techniques: 使用Allen-Cahn方程的渐近分析、变分方法、几何测度论技术，以及Brakke流和广义BV流的理论框架
AI.main_theorems: 主要定理：通过Allen-Cahn方程极限得到的平均曲率流不仅是Brakke流，同时也是Stuvard-Tonegawa定义的广义BV流
AI.significance: 建立了平均曲率流不同弱解概念之间的联系，为理解相场模型与几何流的关系提供了新视角，统一了两种重要的弱解理论框架

title: On variable Lebesgue spaces and generalized nonlinear heat equations
summary:
In this work we address some questions concerning the Cauchy problem for a
generalized nonlinear heat equations considering as functional framework the
variable Lebesgue spaces $L^{p(\cdot)}(\mathbb{R}^n)$. More precisely, by
mixing some structural properties of these spaces with decay estimates of the
fractional heat kernel, we were able to prove two well-posedness results for
these equations. In a first theorem, we prove the existence and uniqueness of
global-in-time mild solutions in the mixed-space $\mathcal{L}^{p(\cdot)}_{
\frac{nb}{2\alpha - \langle 1 \rangle_\gamma} } (\mathbb{R}^n,L^\infty([0,T[
))$. On the other hand, by introducing a new class of variable exponents, we
demonstrate the existence of an unique local-in-time mild solution in the space
$L^{p(\cdot)} \left( [0,T], L^{q} (\mathbb{R}^3) \right)$.

AI.tldr: 证明了变指数Lebesgue空间中广义非线性热方程的适定性结果
AI.motivation: 研究变指数Lebesgue空间$L^{p(\cdot)}(\mathbb{R}^n)$中广义非线性热方程柯西问题的适定性，扩展经典函数空间中的结果
AI.techniques: 结合变指数空间的结构性质与分数热核的衰减估计，使用混合空间方法和新型变指数类
AI.main_theorems: 两个适定性定理：1) 全局温和解在混合空间$\mathcal{L}^{p(\cdot)}_{\frac{nb}{2\alpha - \langle 1 \rangle_\gamma}}(\mathbb{R}^n,L^\infty([0,T[))$中的存在唯一性；2) 局部温和解在空间$L^{p(\cdot)}([0,T],L^q(\mathbb{R}^3))$中的存在唯一性
AI.significance: 将非线性热方程理论推广到变指数函数空间，发展了处理变指数空间适定性问题的新方法，为PDE理论在非标准函数空间中的应用提供基础

title: Gradient flow for a class of diffusion equations with Dirichlet boundary   data
comment: We corrected a mistake in Propositions 5.15 and 5.19
summary:
In this paper we provide a variational characterisation for a class of
non-linear evolution equations with constant non-negative Dirichlet boundary
conditions on a bounded domain as gradient flows in the space of non-negative
measures. The relevant geometry is given by the modified Wasserstein distance
introduced by Figalli and Gigli that allows for a change of mass by letting the
boundary act as a reservoir. We give a dynamic formulation of this distance as
an action minimisation problem for curves of non-negative measures satisfying a
continuity equation in the spirit of Benamou-Brenier. Then we characterise
solutions to non-linear diffusion equations with Dirichlet boundary conditions
as metric gradient flows of internal energy functionals in the sense of curves
of maximal slope.

AI.tldr: 该论文为具有Dirichlet边界条件的非线性扩散方程提供了变分特征，将其刻画为测度空间中关于修正Wasserstein距离的梯度流。
AI.motivation: 研究具有常数非负Dirichlet边界条件的非线性演化方程的变分结构，特别是在有界域上质量可能变化的系统，边界作为质量储存库。
AI.techniques: 使用Figalli和Gigli引入的修正Wasserstein距离几何，Benamou-Brenier型连续性方程的动态公式，以及度量梯度流理论中的最大斜率曲线方法。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 将修正Wasserstein距离表述为满足连续性方程的非负测度曲线的动作最小化问题；2. 将Dirichlet边界条件的非线性扩散方程特征化为内部能量泛函在度量梯度流意义下的最大斜率曲线。
AI.significance: 为具有边界条件的演化方程提供了统一的变分框架，将质量变化纳入几何结构，扩展了最优输运理论在边界值问题中的应用。

title: Gaussian upper heat kernel bounds and Faber-Krahn inequalities on graphs
summary:
We investigate the equivalence of relative Faber-Krahn inequalities and the
conjunction of Gaussian upper heat kernel bounds and volume doubling on large
scales on graphs. For the normalizing measure, we obtain their equivalence up
to constants by imposing comparability of small balls and the vertex degree at
their centers. Removing this comparability assumption on the cost of a local
regularity condition entering the equivalence and allowing for a variable
dimension lead to a further generalization. The variable dimension converges to
the doubling dimension for increasing ball radius. If the counting measure or
arbitrary measures are considered, the local regularity condition contains the
vertex degree. Furthermore, correction functions for the Gaussian, doubling,
and Faber-Krahn dimension depending on the vertex degree are introduced. For
the Gaussian and doubling, the variable correction functions always tend to one
at infinity. Moreover, the variable Faber-Krahn dimension can be related to the
doubling dimension and the vertex degree growth.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了图上相对Faber-Krahn不等式与高斯上界和体积加倍性质之间的等价关系，并建立了依赖于顶点度的修正函数理论。
AI.motivation: 研究图上相对Faber-Krahn不等式与热核高斯上界、体积加倍性质之间的等价关系，探讨在不同测度（正规化测度、计数测度、任意测度）下这些性质的联系，并考虑顶点度对局部正则性的影响。
AI.techniques: 使用热核分析、几何测度理论、Faber-Krahn不等式方法；引入依赖于顶点度的修正函数；分析局部正则条件与全局性质的关系；考虑变维数收敛到加倍维数的渐近行为。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在正规化测度下，小球的比较性和顶点度可比性条件下，相对Faber-Krahn不等式与高斯上界和体积加倍性质等价；2. 去除可比性假设但引入局部正则条件，得到更一般的等价关系；3. 引入依赖于顶点度的高斯、加倍和Faber-Krahn维数修正函数；4. 证明变维数收敛到加倍维数，修正函数在无穷远处趋于1。
AI.significance: 建立了图上热核估计、几何测度性质和谱不等式之间的深刻联系，为图上的分析几何提供了统一框架；修正函数理论揭示了顶点度对局部几何的影响；结果对图上随机过程、谱理论和几何分析有重要应用。

title: Analytic Solution of the N-Dimensional Incompressible Navier-Stokes   Equations
comment:
Updated version improving discussion of kinetic energy constraint.
  This is still a draft, and I am considering restructuring the paper to
  de-emphasize the Clay Math result and focus more on the recurrence relation
  because I think it's more important and the Clay Math result is distracting
  from it
summary:
This paper presents an analytic solution of the incompressible Navier-Stokes
equations as recurrence relations for the solution's derivatives, addressing
the Clay Mathematics Institute's Millennium Prize problem on Navier-Stokes
existence and smoothness.

AI.tldr: 提出了不可压缩Navier-Stokes方程的解析解，通过解的导数递推关系式，旨在解决千禧年大奖问题中的存在性与光滑性问题。
AI.motivation: 针对Clay数学研究所的千禧年大奖问题——Navier-Stokes方程的存在性与光滑性问题，寻求解析解以证明全局光滑解的存在性。
AI.techniques: 通过建立解的导数之间的递推关系式，构造解析解；可能涉及级数展开、递推分析等解析方法。
AI.main_theorems: 给出了不可压缩Navier-Stokes方程的解析解，表示为导数间的递推关系；该解可能证明了全局光滑解的存在性。
AI.significance: 若结果正确，将解决著名的千禧年大奖问题，对流体力学、偏微分方程理论有重大影响，可能开启新的分析工具。

title: Uniform estimates for elliptic equations with Carath\'eodory   nonlinearities at the interior and on the boundary
comment:
key words: A priori estimates, slightly subcritical non-linearities,
  $L^\infty$ a priori bounds, nonlinear boundary conditions
summary:
We establish an explicit uniform a priori estimate for weak solutions to
slightly subcritical elliptic problems with nonlinearities simultaneously at
the interior and on the boundary. Our explicit $L^{\infty}(\Omega )$ a priori
estimates are in terms of powers of their $H^{1}(\Omega )$ norms. To prove our
result, we combine a De Giorgi-Nash-Moser's iteration scheme together with
elliptic regularity and the Gagliardo-Nirenberg's interpolation inequality.

AI.tldr: 建立了具有内部和边界非线性项的次临界椭圆问题弱解的显式一致先验估计
AI.motivation: 研究同时具有内部和边界非线性项的次临界椭圆问题，这类问题在数学物理中有广泛应用，需要建立弱解的显式先验估计来控制解的行为
AI.techniques: 结合De Giorgi-Nash-Moser迭代方案、椭圆正则性理论和Gagliardo-Nirenberg插值不等式
AI.main_theorems: 建立了弱解的显式一致先验估计，给出了解的L∞范数以H¹范数的幂次形式表示的显式界
AI.significance: 为次临界椭圆问题的解提供了显式控制，有助于研究解的存在性、正则性和渐近行为，在非线性偏微分方程理论中有重要应用

title: Critical equations with a sharp change of sign in the nonlinearity
summary:
We establish the existence and nonexistence of entire solutions to a
semilinear elliptic problem whose nonlinearity is the critical power multiplied
by a function that takes the value 1 in an open bounded region and the value -1
in its complement. The existence or not of solutions depends on the geometry of
the bounded region, in a way analogous to what happens with the classical
critical Dirichlet problem in a bounded domain. Our methods are variational and
include the use of topological tools.

AI.tldr: 建立了带符号变化的临界指数非线性椭圆问题整体解的存在性与不存在性，其存在性依赖于有界区域的几何结构
AI.motivation: 研究半线性椭圆问题，其非线性项是临界指数乘以一个在有界区域取值为1、在补集取值为-1的函数，探讨几何结构如何影响解的存在性
AI.techniques: 变分方法，包括拓扑工具的使用
AI.main_theorems: 建立了整体解的存在性与不存在性结果，存在性依赖于有界区域的几何结构，类似于经典有界域上的临界Dirichlet问题
AI.significance: 将经典临界Dirichlet问题的几何依赖性推广到带符号变化的非线性项情形，发展了变分方法和拓扑工具在临界指数问题中的应用

title: Weak uniqueness for stochastic partial differential equations in Hilbert   spaces
summary:
Let $U,H$ be two separable Hilbert spaces. The main goal of this paper is to
study the weak uniqueness of the Stochastic Differential Equation evolving in
$H$ \begin{align*} dX(t)=AX(t)dt+\mathcal{V}B(X(t))dt+GdW(t), \quad t>0, \quad
X(0)=x \in H, \end{align*} where $\{W(t)\}_{t\geq 0}$ is a $U$-cylindrical
Wiener process, $A:D(A)\subseteq H\to H$ is the infinitesimal generator of a
strongly continuous semigroup, $\mathcal{V},G:U\rightarrow H$ are linear
bounded operators and $B:H\rightarrow U$ is a uniformly continuous function.
The abstract result in this paper gives the weak uniqueness for large classes
of heat and damped equations in any dimension without any H\"older continuity
assumption on $B$.

AI.tldr: 该论文证明了Hilbert空间中一类随机微分方程的弱唯一性，无需对漂移项施加Hölder连续性假设。
AI.motivation: 研究Hilbert空间中随机微分方程的弱唯一性问题，特别是当漂移项B仅满足一致连续性而非Hölder连续性时，扩展了现有理论的应用范围。
AI.techniques: 使用Hilbert空间框架、圆柱Wiener过程、强连续半群理论，以及弱唯一性的抽象分析方法，避免了对漂移项的Hölder连续性要求。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了抽象弱唯一性定理，适用于任意维度的热方程和阻尼方程，其中漂移项B仅需一致连续，无需Hölder连续性条件。
AI.significance: 显著扩展了随机微分方程弱唯一性理论的应用范围，为处理更一般的漂移项提供了理论工具，在无限维随机分析和PDE理论中有重要应用。

title: Decay estimates for solutions to non-autonomous critical p-Laplace   problems
summary:
We prove optimal decay estimates for positive solutions to elliptic
p-Laplacian problems in the entire Euclidean space, when a critical
nonlinearity with a decaying source term is considered. Also gradient decay
estimates are furnished. Our results extend previous theorems in the
literature, in which a purely critical reaction is treated. The technique is
based on a priori estimates, regularity results, and rescaling arguments,
combined with the doubling lemma.

AI.tldr: 证明了带衰减源项的临界非线性p-Laplace方程正解的最优衰减估计和梯度衰减估计
AI.motivation: 研究整个欧几里得空间中p-Laplace椭圆问题的正解衰减行为，特别是处理带衰减源项的临界非线性情形，扩展了文献中仅处理纯临界反应的结果
AI.techniques: 基于先验估计、正则性结果、尺度变换论证，并结合加倍引理
AI.main_theorems: 证明了正解的最优衰减估计和梯度衰减估计，结果扩展了文献中仅处理纯临界反应的定理
AI.significance: 为带衰减源项的临界非线性p-Laplace方程提供了完整的衰减理论，深化了对这类方程渐近行为的理解，具有重要的理论意义

title: Physics-Informed Neural Networks for Solving Forward and Inverse PDEs   with Limited and Noisy Data: Application to Solar Corona Modeling
summary:
I will demonstrate the effectiveness of Physics-Informed Neural Networks
(PINNs) in solving partial differential equations (PDEs) when training data are
scarce or noisy. The training data can be located either at the boundaries or
within the domain. Additionally, PINNs can be used as an inverse method to
determine unknown coefficients in the equations. This study will highlight the
application of PINNs in modeling magnetohydrodynamic processes relevant to
strongly magnetized plasmas, such as those found in the solar corona.

AI.tldr: PINNs在数据稀缺或噪声条件下求解PDE的有效性验证及其在磁流体动力学中的应用
AI.motivation: 传统PDE求解方法在训练数据稀缺或噪声较大时效果受限，特别是在太阳日冕等强磁化等离子体的磁流体动力学建模中，需要处理边界或域内数据不足的问题
AI.techniques: 物理信息神经网络（PINNs），结合物理约束的深度学习框架，用于正向PDE求解和逆向参数识别
AI.main_theorems: 展示了PINNs在数据稀缺和噪声条件下的有效性，验证了其作为逆向方法确定方程未知系数的能力，并应用于磁流体动力学过程建模
AI.significance: 为数据稀缺的PDE求解提供了新方法，扩展了PINNs在等离子体物理和天体物理中的应用，为复杂物理系统的建模和参数识别提供了计算工具

title: Wave breaking for the nonlinear variational wave equation
summary:
Following conservative solutions of the nonlinear variational wave equation
$u_{tt}-c(u)(c(u)u_x)_x=0$ along forward and backward characteristics, we
identify criteria, which guarantee that wave breaking either occurs in the
nearby future or occurred recently. Thereafter, we apply the established
criteria to show that not every traveling wave solution is a conservative
solution. Furthermore, we show that conservative solutions can locally behave
like solutions to the linear wave equation and hence energy that concentrates
on sets of measure zero might remain concentrated instead of spreading out
immediately.

AI.tldr: 建立了非线性变分波方程保守解的波破裂判据，揭示了行波解不一定是保守解，以及能量在零测集上保持集中的现象
AI.motivation: 研究非线性变分波方程 $u_{tt}-c(u)(c(u)u_x)_x=0$ 的保守解性质，特别是波破裂现象、行波解与保守解的关系，以及能量集中行为的数学特征
AI.techniques: 沿向前和向后特征线追踪保守解，建立波破裂的判据条件，分析能量在零测集上的集中与扩散行为
AI.main_theorems: 1. 建立了波破裂在近期发生或已发生的判据；2. 证明了并非所有行波解都是保守解；3. 展示了保守解可局部表现为线性波方程解，能量可在零测集上保持集中而不立即扩散
AI.significance: 深化了对非线性波方程保守解奇异行为的理解，揭示了能量集中现象与线性化行为的联系，为波破裂理论提供了新的数学判据

title: Weak Harnack estimates for a doubly nonlinear nonlocal p-Laplace   equation
summary:
We establish a new type of weak Harnack estimates with optimal parabolic tail
for the weak supersolutions to a doubly nonlinear nonlocal $p$-Laplace
equation, which is modeled on the nonlocal Trudinger equation. Our results are
achieved by employing the expansion of positivity and measure theoretical
techniques. In particular, the weak Harnack estimates highlight the nonlocal
feature, as we only require the local positivity of weak supersolutions instead
of the global one.

AI.tldr: 建立了具有最优抛物线尾项的弱Harnack估计，用于双非线性非局部p-Laplace方程的弱超解
AI.motivation: 研究非局部Trudinger方程模型的双非线性非局部p-Laplace方程，需要建立适用于非局部算子的正则性理论，特别是弱超解的Harnack型估计
AI.techniques: 采用正性扩张方法和测度理论技术，利用非局部特征，仅要求弱超解的局部正性而非全局正性
AI.main_theorems: 建立了具有最优抛物线尾项的新型弱Harnack估计，适用于双非线性非局部p-Laplace方程的弱超解
AI.significance: 为非局部偏微分方程的正则性理论提供了新工具，突出了非局部特征在Harnack估计中的独特作用，对非局部椭圆和抛物型方程的研究具有重要意义

title: Global existence of martingale solutions to stochastic keller-segel   system with degenerate diffusion
summary:
In this paper, we study the stochastic degenerate Keller-Segel system
perturbed by linear multiplicative noise in a bounded domain $\mathcal{O}$. We
establish the global existence of martingale solutions for this model with any
nonnegative initial data in $H_{2}^{-1}(\mathcal{O})$. The main challenge in
proving the existence of solutions arises from the degeneracy of the porous
media diffusion and the lack of coercivity in the nonlinear chemotactic term.
To overcome these difficulties, we construct a solution operator and apply the
Schauder fixed point theorem within the variational framework.

AI.tldr: 证明了带线性乘性噪声的随机退化Keller-Segel系统在任意非负初值下的全局鞅解存在性
AI.motivation: 研究有界区域中受线性乘性噪声扰动的随机退化Keller-Segel系统，解决多孔介质扩散的退化性和非线性趋化项缺乏强制性带来的挑战
AI.techniques: 构造解算子并应用Schauder不动点定理，在变分框架下处理退化扩散和非强制性非线性项
AI.main_theorems: 建立了该模型在任意非负初值$H_{2}^{-1}(\mathcal{O})$下的全局鞅解存在性
AI.significance: 为随机退化反应扩散系统提供了新的存在性理论，扩展了Keller-Segel模型在随机扰动下的数学分析框架

title: Shock formation for the 2D rotating shallow water equations with   non-zero vorticity
summary:
In the paper, the shock formation for the two-dimensional rotating shallow
water system is established. We construct a large class of initial data which
leads to the finite-time blow-up for the solutions. Moreover, the solutions are
allowed to have non-zero large vorticity (in derivative sense), even up to the
shock. Our results provide the first complete geometric description of the
shock formation mechanism to the two-dimensional rotating shallow water system
with vorticity. The formation of shock is characterized by the collapse of the
characteristic hypersurfaces, where the first-order derivatives of the
velocity, the height, and the specific vorticity blow up while the potential
vorticity remains Lipschitz continuous. The methods developed in this paper
should also be useful in studying the shock formation for the Euler equations
with various source terms and a class of quasilinear Klein-Gordon equations in
multi-dimensions.

AI.tldr: 建立了二维旋转浅水系统中激波形成的理论，首次给出了具有涡度情形下激波形成的完整几何描述
AI.motivation: 研究二维旋转浅水系统中激波形成的机制，特别关注具有非零大涡度（导数意义下）的情形，填补了该领域在涡度存在时激波形成理论研究的空白
AI.techniques: 几何特征曲面方法、特征线分析、势涡度守恒律、特征曲面坍塌理论、非线性波动方程技术
AI.main_theorems: 构造了导致有限时间爆破解的大类初始数据；证明了即使涡度非零且大，激波仍会形成；给出了速度、高度和比涡度一阶导数爆破而势涡度保持Lipschitz连续的激波形成特征描述
AI.significance: 首次完整描述了二维旋转浅水系统在涡度存在时的激波形成机制，为研究带源项Euler方程和多维拟线性Klein-Gordon方程的激波形成提供了新方法

title: Weak-strong uniqueness for solutions to mean-field games
summary:
This paper addresses the crucial question of solution uniqueness in
stationary first-order Mean-Field Games (MFGs). Despite well-established
existence results, establishing uniqueness, particularly for weaker solutions
in the sense of monotone operators, remains an open challenge. Building upon
the framework of monotonicity methods, we introduce a linearization method that
enables us to prove a weak-strong uniqueness result for stationary MFG systems
on the d-dimensional torus. In particular, we give explicit conditions under
which this uniqueness holds.

AI.tldr: 提出一种线性化方法，证明平稳一阶平均场博弈系统在单调算子意义下的弱-强唯一性结果
AI.motivation: 平稳一阶平均场博弈虽然已有存在性结果，但在单调算子意义下的弱解唯一性问题仍未解决，这是该领域的一个重要开放问题
AI.techniques: 基于单调性方法框架，引入线性化技术，在d维环面上建立弱-强唯一性
AI.main_theorems: 证明了平稳MFG系统的弱-强唯一性结果，并给出了保证唯一性成立的显式条件
AI.significance: 首次在单调算子框架下解决了平稳MFG的弱解唯一性问题，为平均场博弈理论提供了重要的数学基础

title: An introduction to monotonicity methods in mean-field games
summary:
This chapter examines monotonicity techniques in the theory of mean-field
games(MFGs). Originally, monotonicity ideas were used to establish the
uniqueness of solutions for MFGs. Later, monotonicity methods and monotone
operators were further exploited to build numerical methods and to construct
weak solutions under mild assumptions. Here, after a brief discussion on the
mean-field game formulation, we introduce the Minty method and regularization
strategies for PDEs. These are then used to address typical stationary and
time-dependent monotone MFGs and to establish the existence of weak solutions
for such MFGs.

AI.tldr: 该章节系统研究了平均场博弈理论中的单调性技术，从解的唯一性证明扩展到数值方法和弱解构造
AI.motivation: 平均场博弈理论中需要建立解的存在性、唯一性和数值计算方法，单调性技术为解决这些问题提供了有效工具
AI.techniques: Minty方法、正则化策略、单调算子理论、PDE分析技术
AI.main_theorems: 建立了典型定常和时变单调平均场博弈的弱解存在性定理
AI.significance: 将单调性技术从解的唯一性证明扩展到数值方法和弱解构造，为平均场博弈理论提供了系统的分析框架

title: Off-diagonal upper heat kernel bounds on graphs with unbounded geometry
summary:
Results regarding off-diagonal Gaussian upper heat kernel bounds on discrete
weighted graphs with possibly unbounded geometry are summarized and related.
  After reviewing uniform upper heat kernel bounds obtained by Carlen, Kusuoka,
and Stroock, the universal Gaussian term on graphs found by Davies is addressed
and related to corresponding results in terms of intrinsic metrics. Then we
present a version of Grigor'yan's two-point method with Gaussian term involving
an intrinsic metric. A discussion of upper heat kernel bounds for graph
Laplacians with possibly unbounded but integrable weights on bounded
combinatorial graphs preceeds the presentation of compatible bounds for
anti-trees, an example of combinatorial graph with unbounded Laplacian.
Characterizations of localized heat kernel bounds in terms of intrinsic metrics
and universal Gaussian are reconsidered. Finally, the problem of optimality of
the Gaussian term is discussed by relating Davies' optimal metric with the
supremum over all intrinsic metrics.

AI.tldr: 该论文综述了离散加权图上非对角高斯型热核上界的结果，特别关注无界几何情形，并探讨了高斯项的最优性问题。
AI.motivation: 研究离散加权图上热核的高斯型上界估计，特别是针对具有无界几何结构的图，这类问题在随机过程、谱理论和几何分析中有重要应用。
AI.techniques: 使用内在度量方法、Grigor'yan两点法、Davies最优度量理论，以及Carlen-Kusuoka-Stroock的一致上界技术。
AI.main_theorems: 总结了多种高斯型热核上界结果：包括一致上界、Davies的通用高斯项、内在度量下的Grigor'yan两点法版本，以及对反树等特殊图类的具体估计。
AI.significance: 为离散图上的热核分析提供了系统的理论框架，特别是解决了无界几何情形下的估计问题，对理解图上的扩散过程和谱性质有重要意义。

title: Boltzmann framework for polyatomic gases: review on well-posedness,   higher integrability and physical relevance
summary:
This paper reviews results on the scalar Boltzmann equation for a
single-component polyatomic gas with continuous internal energy. For the space
homogeneous problem, $L^1$-theory is established, for solutions with initial
strictly positive mass and bounded energy, which enables to solve the Cauchy
problem for initial data with $L^1_{2^+}$-moments using the comparison
principle for ODEs. Then, deriving entropy-based estimates, $L^p$-integrability
properties of the solution are explored, $p\in (1,\infty]$. All these
analytical results hold under a specific assumption on the collision kernel
corresponding to cut-off and hard-potentials type. A mean to verify physical
applicability of the model is to evaluate the corresponding Boltzmann collision
operator and to derive models for transport coefficients in terms of the
collision kernel parameters. Comparison with experimental data for polytropic
gases determines values of these parameters showing the physical relevance of
the collision kernel.

AI.tldr: 建立了具有连续内能的单组分多原子气体Boltzmann方程的L¹理论，并探索了L^p可积性性质
AI.motivation: 研究具有连续内能的单组分多原子气体的Boltzmann方程，该模型比单原子气体更复杂，需要处理内部自由度，为实际气体动力学提供更精确的数学模型
AI.techniques: 使用ODE比较原理解决Cauchy问题，推导基于熵的估计，分析L^p可积性，在截断和硬势类型的碰撞核假设下建立理论框架
AI.main_theorems: 建立了空间齐次问题的L¹理论，解决了具有L¹_{2^+}矩的初值Cauchy问题，探索了p∈(1,∞]的L^p可积性性质
AI.significance: 为多原子气体动力学提供了严格的数学基础，验证了模型的物理适用性，为输运系数的建模提供了理论依据，并与多原子气体实验数据进行了比较验证
